CustomField.label: Most Recent Closed Lost Date
CustomField.description: Most recent Stage_Entered_Closed__c date across all Closed Lost Opportunities (both Recruiting and Re-Engagement) on this Account. Used to calculate days since the advisor was most recently lost. NULL values are ignored by MAX — for older records where Stage_Entered_Closed__c is null, the formula falls back to the opp's own dates.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The most recent date any opportunity for this advisor entered Closed Lost stage.
